properties.displayName: Generic Accounts Payable to ARM Worklist 1.5-ResolveVendorId Test

When_a_new_email_arrives_in_a_shared_mai.description: This step will trigger and verify the shared mailbox (invoicecapture@contoso.com.au) at regular intervals, usually every 3 minutes, for any invoice sent by vendor with attachments (invoices).

Filter_PDF_attachments.description: Filtering Query to check only PDF files.

Call_Azure_OCR_via_HTTP_Trigger.description: Using HTTP request to call Azure AI to extract data

Parse_OCR_Success_JSON_Response.description: Generating JSON response with details from file

Set_Invoice_Type_Azure.description: Set Invoice Type from the JSON. If DocumentType is empty or equals "other" (case-insensitive), it returns "Other". Otherwise, it returns the actual DocumentType value.

Set_InvoiceDate_Az.description: Set Invoice date from the JSON

Set_InvoiceTotal_Az.description: Set Invoice Total from the JSON

Set_Invoice_No_Az.description: Set Invoice number from the JSON

Set_Customer_Name_Az.description: Set Customer Name or Company Name in capital letters (CONTOSO LIMITED, CONTOSO COMMUNITY SERVICES, CONTOSO HUMAN SERVICES) from the JSON

Set_Purchase_Order_Az.description: Set Purchase Order from the JSON

inputs.name: VendorName

Set_Vendor_Name.description:
Set Vendor Name from the JSON by checking three options to get a vendor name:

First, it looks for VendorNameClassify.

If that's missing, it tries VendorName.

If both are missing, it uses "UnknownVendor".

Compose_Az.description: It joins several pieces of data together using '___' as a separator. Returning a single string. Here's what it includes: VendorName, PO (Purchase Order), Invoice Date, If it's empty or "NO_DATE", it adds "NO_DATE", Otherwise, it formats the date dd_MM_yy.

Add_a_row_into_a_table_Credit_Note.description: If document is a Credit Note, it will add a row in OCRInvoices.xlsx in COR CN table.

Create_file_Az_Credit_Note.description: Creating a file in the Worklist as Credit Note.

Add_a_row_into_a_table_Statement.description: If the file is not and statement, it will generate a row with details where no purchase order has been found.

Create_file_Az_Statement.description: If the document is a statement, a file will be created in Statements folder in ARM Live.

Create_file_Az_3.description: In case there is a Purchase order in the file, this step will create a file in the Worklist.

Add_a_row_into_a_table_1_2.description: This step will add a row with the respective details for the invoice in the OCRInvoices.xlsx in the OCR table.

Add_a_row_into_a_table_1_AP_File_2.description: This step will add a row with the respective details for the invoice in the OCRInvoices.xlsx in the OCR table.

Add_a_row_into_a_table_1-NO_PO_FOUND.description: If the file is not and statement, it will generate a row with details where no purchase order has been found.

Add_a_row_into_a_table_1-NO_PO_FOUND_AP_.description: If the file is not and statement, it will generate a row with details where no purchase order has been found.

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: PO missing and/or ABN not matching from @{outputs('Add_a_row_into_a_table_1-NO_PO_FOUND')?['body/Vendor Name']} with Invoice ID @{outputs('Add_a_row_into_a_table_1-NO_PO_FOUND')?['body/Invoice']}
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Hello Team,


PO missing and/or ANB is not matching in the following Invoice ID @{outputs('Add_a_row_into_a_table_1-NO_PO_FOUND')?['body/Invoice']} for vendor @{outputs('Add_a_row_into_a_table_1-NO_PO_FOUND')?['body/Vendor Name']}. Please verify the Invoice File and send back to the vendor.


CHS_@{outputs('Compose_Az')}@{variables('InvoiceNo')}.PDF


Kind regards,


Invoice Automate

______________________________________________________________________________


@{triggerOutputs()?['body/body']}

Send_an_email_(V2)_NOPO_Mailbox.description: An email will be sent to NOPO mail for Procurement to review the document.

Create_file_Az_3_1.description: In case there is a Purchase order in the file, this step will create a file in the Worklist.

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: This invoice is not NOI or has PO @{variables('InvoiceNo')}
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Hello Team,


This invoice is not NOI or has PO. Please check with the vendor.


CHS_@{outputs('Compose_Az')}@{variables('InvoiceNo')}.PDF


Kind regards,


Invoice Automate


___________________________________________________________________________________


@{triggerOutputs()?['body/body']}

Send_an_email_(V2)_NOPO_Mailbox_1.description: An email will be sent to NOPO mail for Procurement to review the document.

Create_file_Az_3_2.description: In case there is a Purchase order in the file, this step will create a file in the Worklist.

Create_file_Az.description: In case there is a Purchase order in the file, this step will create a file in the Worklist.

Add_a_row_into_a_table_1.description: This step will add a row with the respective details for the invoice in the OCRInvoices.xlsx in the OCR table.

Add_a_row_into_a_table_1_AP_File.description: This step will add a row with the respective details for the invoice in the OCRInvoices.xlsx in the OCR table.

Add_a_row_into_a_table_1-NO_ABN_MATCHING.description: If the file is not and statement, it will generate a row with details where no purchase order has been found.
If the file is not and statement, it will generate a row with details where no purchase order has been found.

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: ABN not matching from @{outputs('Add_a_row_into_a_table_1-NO_ABN_MATCHING_AP_File_1')?['body/Vendor Name']} with Invoice ID @{outputs('Add_a_row_into_a_table_1-NO_ABN_MATCHING_AP_File_1')?['body/Invoice']}
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
The ABN value does not match for Invoice ID @{outputs('Add_a_row_into_a_table_1-NO_ABN_MATCHING_AP_File_1')?['body/Invoice']}. Please verify the invoice file, process it manually, and advise Procurement Team.

Kind regards,


CHS_@{outputs('Compose_Az')}@{variables('InvoiceNo')}.PDF


Invoice Automate


______________________________________________________________________________

@{triggerOutputs()?['body/body']}

Create_file_Az_3_1_1.description: In case there is a Purchase order in the file, this step will create a file in the Worklist.

Condition_Check_PO.description: If the Entity is correct in the document, then this step will check the PO number in the file.

Create_file_Az_1.description: In case there is a Purchase order in the file, this step will create a file in the Worklist.

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: Contoso, Action Required: Incorrect Legal Entity on Invoice @{variables('InvoiceNo')}
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Hello AP Team,

Our system has identified that invoice @{variables('InvoiceNo')} is using references for incorrect legal entity. Please review the intended recipient of the invoice action manually in the invoice capture system.

If you're unsure which entity is correct, please contact Procurement Team procurement@contoso.com.au for clarification.


CHS_@{outputs('Compose_Az')}@{variables('InvoiceNo')}.PDF

Kind regards,

Invoice Automate

Send_an_email_(V2)_Entities_Check.description: This step will send an email to the AP Team with the invoice, requesting them to check and action the invoice. NOPO email is include as BCC for Procurement team to follow in case they need.

Condition_Entity.description: If the file is not a credit note, Customer Name is compared with the different variations for the company entities from Contoso, this needs to match or contain CONTOSO COMMUNITY SERVICES or CONTOSO HUMAN SERVICES or CONTOSO LIMITED.

Add_a_row_into_a_table_1_1.description: This step will add a row with the respective details for the invoice in the OCRInvoices.xlsx in the OCR table.

Add_a_row_into_a_table_1_AP_File_1.description: This step will add a row with the respective details for the invoice in the OCRInvoices.xlsx in the OCR table.

Create_file_Az_2.description: In case there is a Purchase order in the file, this step will create a file in the Worklist.

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: Manual Processing Required – OCR Could Not Complete
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Hello Team,


Please review this document attached and process it manually, as the OCR automation was unable to handle it.


CHS_@{outputs('Compose_Az')}@{variables('InvoiceNo')}.PDF


Kind regards,


Invoice Automate

Add_a_row_into_a_table_Credit_Note_1.description: If document is a Credit Note, it will add a row in OCRInvoices.xlsx in COR CN table.

Create_file_Az_Credit_Note_1.description: Creating a file in the Worklist as Credit Note.

Scope_to_handle_errors.description: This step covers the majority of the automation process and includes error handling to manage any potential failures.

Create_file_Az_in_the_Worklist_for_AP_Te.description: In case the AI or Automation fails, a file will be created in the Worklist for the AP team to process manually.

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: Invoice/CN Issue for @{string(variables('VendorName'))} – Invoice No. @{string(variables('InvoiceNo'))} PO: @{string(variables('InvoiceNo'))}
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Hello AP Team,


Please review the status of this invoice or credit note for @{string(variables('VendorName'))}. The invoice number @{string(variables('InvoiceNo'))} with name @{outputs('Add_a_row_into_a_table_Credit_Note')?['body/FileName']}has failed due to the AI Model could not handle the invoice in the OCR Automation.


File name in Worklist: CHS_@{outputs('Compose_Az')}@{variables('InvoiceNo')}.PDF

Kindly process and take appropriate action.


Invoice Automate

Send_an_email_(V2)_Failing_Notification.description: If the file is a tax invoice, credit note, and a pdf file. An email will be sent to IT Help Desk to check on this issue.

Condition_Failing.description: If the Notification step is triggered, a condition will check that the document type is Tax Invoice, Credit Note, and PDF File.

Notification_Failing.description: This step will trigger when the "Scope to handle errors" step has failed.

Set_ABN.description: Set ABN from Vendor Tax ID

Set_Company_Code.description: Set Company Code or Customer Classification for Contoso (MCS, MHS, MCL) from the JSON

Is_the_Attachment_a_PDF.description: Verifying the attachment if the file is in PDF format. If TRUE, it will call the AI Model to extract details.

Process_Each_Attachment.description: Generating a Loop or Cycle to check each attachment that is PDF in the email.

Move_email_(V2)_to_Invoice_Capture.description: When the cycle or look finishing processing each attachment in the email, this step will move the mail to ARM Processed folder in the Invoice Capture mailbox, and the flow will end.
